title: Tile Rite PSS246 Professional Silicone Seal Smoother Finisher, Set of 2 Pieces
features: The professional seal smoother, removes, smooths & models silicone, acrylic & SMP sealants for a professional neat finish
Ideal for baths, showers, basins, window sills, aquariums & balconies etc
Easy to use tool, no need to tape or mask joints
Pack contains 2 seal smoothers to create a quadrant or triangular seal
description: Product Description This professional silicone seal smoother makes light work of sealing around your bath or shower no need to tape or mask joints. Excess silicone is smoothed away effortlessly and the tool is easily wiped clean. The unique angles create a quadrant or triangualr seal which provide a better seal than the conventional concave seal and prevent mould formation. Ideal for baths, showers, basins, window sills, aquariums & balconies etc. Box Contains 2 x silicone seal smoothers
